name: Retrieve Order History Performance Test
description: Validate the performance of the order history read operation when retrieving filtered historical order data under load.
preconditions: Users must have historical order data.
The selected time range must include existing orders.
The API is read-only; either no authentication is required or static tokens are used.

input data.authentication: Not required or static token if applicable

notes: Use representative historical datasets and realistic filter ranges. Consider testing cached and uncached scenarios separately if relevant.
